source: Default RFH SEC16 used by the existing single BCM pair (anonymized BCM dump SAMPLE_BCM_SYNCED_2C3CDXL90MH582899). Per-pair entries below override this with their own captured SEC16 — see README.md for provenance + anonymization notes.

bcm.source: Derived from src/__tests__/fixtures/SAMPLE_BCM_SYNCED_2C3CDXL90MH582899.bin (VIN already anonymized). Captured RFH SEC16 = 86fa72... extracted from BCM split records @ 0x81A0 (BCM SEC16 = edbdff7cbbabc3a07d5a60763772fa86 = reverse(RFH SEC16)).

rfhub.source: Anonymized real-bench RFHUB Gen2 (24C32, 4 KB) capture from attached_assets/RFH_20CHRGR6.2_KEYPROG_2C3CDXCT1HH652640.bin — VIN scrubbed (652640→600000) at 4 reverse-VIN slots (0xEA5/0xEB9/0xECD/0xEE1). 'after' = captured synced RFHUB. 'before' = same buffer with the two Gen2 SEC16 slots @ 0x050E and 0x0522 erased to 0xFF (16B SEC16 + 2B CS each).

pcm.source: Anonymized real-bench PCM GPEC2A (95320, 4 KB) capture from attached_assets/PCM_FCA_CONTINENTAL_GPEC2A_4KB_KEYPROG_2C3CDXCT1HH652640.bin — VIN scrubbed (652640→600000) at 0x0000/0x01F0/0x0224. 'after' = captured synced PCM (SEC6 = 81 65 31 f7 cd e3 = first 6 bytes of paired RFH SEC16). 'before' = same buffer with marker @ 0x3C4..0x3C7 and SEC6 @ 0x3C8..0x3CD erased to 0xFF.

extraBcms.source: Second BCM VIN-write pair, distinct from the primary 2C3CDXL90MH582899 fixture. Anonymized real-bench BCM (MPC5606B DFLASH, 64 KB) capture from attached_assets/BCM_22CHARGER_REDEYE_6.2_KEYPROG_2C3CDXCT1HH652640.bin — VIN scrubbed (652640→600000) wherever the 17-char VIN appears in plaintext. Same anonymized vehicle as the rfhub/pcm slot above (real-bench triple). 'after' = captured synced BCM. 'before' = same buffer with the writer-target bytes erased to 0xFF: split records @ 0x81A0/C0/E0 (+9..+15 prefix7, +20..+28 suffix9) and the inactive-bank mirror records @ 0x40C0 (slot 0xEB / size 0x18) and 0x40E8 (slot 0xCA / size 0x28) at +8..+31. Headers + separators left intact so the writer's matchers fire.

extraPcms.source: Task #433 — second PCM pair pinning the 8 KB GPEC2A layout against a real capture. Anonymized real-bench PCM (Continental GPEC2A 95640, 8 KB) from attached_assets/PCM_FCA_CONTINENTAL_GPEC2A_8KB_KEYPROG_2C3CDXCT1HH652640.bin — VIN scrubbed (652640→600000) at 4 plaintext slots (0x0000/0x01F0/0x0224/0x0CE0; the 4th slot does not exist on the 4 KB sibling). Same anonymized vehicle as the rfhub/pcm 4 KB slot above; SEC6 secret matches (81 65 31 f7 cd e3) because both PCMs were paired to the same RFHUB. 'after' = captured synced 8 KB image with canonical FF FF FF AA marker @ 0x3C4 + SEC6 @ 0x3C8; half-2 (0x1000..0x1FFF) is 0xFF padding. 'before' = same buffer with marker @ 0x3C4..0x3C7 and SEC6 @ 0x3C8..0x3CD erased to 0xFF. Confirms the writePcmSec6 doc-comment assertion that the 8 KB image is just a larger GPEC2A — same marker offset, same SEC6 offset, no GPEC5 variant.
